Mar 08, 2026 · 1 min read

AI Brief — March 8, 2026

GeminiMCPMarketplace

Top Stories

Google Launches Gemini 2.5 Flash

Optimized for speed and cost, Gemini 2.5 Flash processes 1M tokens in under 2 seconds. Google positions it as the go-to model for real-time AI applications.

MCP Protocol Reaches Universal Adoption

Anthropic's Model Context Protocol now supports 500+ integrations. Major platforms including Slack, Notion, Jira, and Salesforce have native MCP connectors. The protocol is becoming the de facto standard for AI-to-application communication.

First AI Agent Marketplace Goes Live

A16Z-backed startup AgentHub launches the first commercial marketplace for pre-built AI agents. Categories include sales, customer support, data analysis, and DevOps. Prices range from $50-500/month per agent.

Enterprise AI Updates

  • Notion released Notion AI Agents for automated workspace management
  • Figma launched AI Design Agents that can produce production-ready UI from briefs
  • HubSpot integrated autonomous sales agents for lead qualification and outreach

What to Watch

The "agent economy" is forming rapidly. Companies that build composable, interoperable agents with standard protocols (MCP, OpenAPI) will likely dominate. The question is whether enterprises will build custom agents or buy from marketplaces.
